content.body: Richard Gibson: I filed [this draft PR](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-intl-keep-trailing-zeros/pull/19) to resolve issue #15 for keep-trailing-zeros. I might still teak it a bit, but it's probably relatively final.

content.body: thanks. I had started work on this, but then suffered an availability crunch and was hoping to finish tomorrow. You've taken a similar approach, and I have no architectural changes to suggest.
